outlook.summary: With total GEX extremely positive at 28B, market makers are heavily long gamma, actively suppressing volatility and stabilizing prices. Despite a strong bearish skew and high put/call ratios, dealers will buy dips and sell rips, creating a highly range-bound environment between the 7000 put wall and 7350 call wall.

WEEKLY Max Pain combined with strong Put OI in WEEKLY (4793) and MONTHLY (2259), creating a solid structural support level.
0DTE Gamma Flip level marking the exact boundary where dealer gamma shifts from positive to negative, defining the structural bullish/bearish threshold.
0DTE Max Pain level. With positive GEX suppressing volatility, price is highly attracted to this level for today's session.
